zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Barnes Mason於1454年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親William Mason I26歲，母親Alice Dunne or Done22歲。他於1479年與Margareta Higgins在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Barnes Mason于1454年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲William Mason I26岁，母亲Alice Dunne or Done22岁。他于1479年与Margareta Higgins在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1547年享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Masson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Lucien, Alain, Henri, Pierre, Yves, Agathe, Aime, Cecile, Clovis, Francois, Francoise.

variants.name: Machin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Juan, Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Blanca, Diego, Luis, Ramon.
English: variant of   Machen  . This is the more common form of the name in Britain and Ireland.
Spanish (Machín): probably a nickname from machín ‘boor, lout’, often applied to a blacksmith's apprentice.

variants.name: Macon
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Machen
meanings: English: variant of Mason , from the Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: Barnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Barnaby   or its learned equivalent   Barnabas .

variants.name: Barnabas
meanings: From the New Testament, where Barnabas represents a Greek form of an Aramaic name meaning ‘son of consolation’. St Barnabas was a Jewish Cypriot, one of the earliest Christian missionaries, who sold his property and gave the proceeds to the Church. He worked with St Paul until about ad 48 .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Barnes Mason was born in 1454, in Shropshire, England, his father, William Mason I, was 26 and his mother, Alice Dunne or Done, was 22. He married Margareta Higgins in 1479, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1547, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Barnes Mason est né en 1454, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, William Mason I, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice Dunne or Done, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margareta Higgins en 1479, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1547, à l’âge de 93 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Barnes Mason 1454 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Mason I 26 und seine Mutter Alice Dunne or Done 22. Er hat 1479 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Margareta Higgins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1547 im Alter von 93 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Barnes Mason è nato il nel 1454 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, William Mason I, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Alice Dunne or Done, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margareta Higgins nel 1479, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1547, all'età di 93 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Barnes Masonが1454年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Mason Iは26歳，母Alice Dunne or Doneは22歳であった。1479年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでMargareta Higginsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年に93歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Barnes Mason(이)가 1454년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mason I(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Dunne or Done(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1479년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Margareta Higgins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Barnes Mason nasceu em 1454, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mason I, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice Dunne or Done, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margareta Higgins em 1479, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1547, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Barnes Mason родился в 1454 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Mason I было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Dunne or Done, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margareta Higgins в 1479 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1547 г. в возрасте 93 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Barnes Mason nació en 1454, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mason I, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice Dunne or Done, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margareta Higgins en 1479, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1547, a la edad de 93 años.
